name: BPCL SBI Card OCTANE
exclusions: fuel spends outside eligible BPCL reward construct
transactions excluded under BPCL SBI Card OCTANE terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee reversal on annual spends of Rs 2 lakh or more in the previous year
additionalBenefits: 6,000 activation bonus Reward Points worth Rs 1,500 on payment of joining fee
25 Reward Points per Rs 100 on fuel and lubricant purchases at BPCL petrol pumps, capped at 2,500 Reward Points per billing cycle
25 Reward Points per Rs 100 on Bharatgas online payments, capped at 2,500 Reward Points per billing cycle
10 Reward Points per Rs 100 on grocery, departmental stores, movies and dining spends, capped at 5,000 Reward Points per month
1 Reward Point per Rs 100 on other eligible non-fuel retail purchases
4 Reward Points equal Re 1 and can be redeemed for fuel at participating BPCL outlets or through SBI Card rewards options
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible BPCL fuel transactions up to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 100 per month
4 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year, capped at 1 per quarter
